featured_projects.title: GitScope
featured_projects.description: A Chrome extension that adds a contribution insights dashboard to any GitHub profile - streaks, language breakdown, PR stats, activity heatmap, and more. Published on Chrome Web Store.
features: Stats grid with streaks, stars, PRs, and contributions
Color-coded language breakdown and top repositories
20-week activity heatmap and contribution donut chart
OAuth via Cloudflare Worker with server-side secrets

featured_projects.title: Ledger Sync
featured_projects.description: A self-hosted personal finance application that syncs transaction data from Excel files and provides comprehensive analytics with smart duplicate detection, spending analysis, and investment tracking.
features: Drag-and-drop Excel upload with SHA-256 deduplication

featured_projects.title: Leetcode Rating Predictor
featured_projects.description: Full-stack LeetCode contest rating predictor using a Dense neural network trained on 244K+ contest records with MAE ~14, featuring a FastAPI backend and React glassmorphism frontend.
features: Automated data pipeline via LeetCode GraphQL API

featured_projects.title: Blue Green AWS Terraform
featured_projects.description: A comprehensive Infrastructure as Code solution for implementing Blue-Green deployment on AWS using Terraform, providing a complete CI/CD pipeline with zero-downtime deployments.

featured_projects.title: Instagram Likes Leaderboard
featured_projects.description: A browser tool that scans your Instagram posts and shows a ranked leaderboard of your biggest fans - followers and non-followers - sorted by how many posts they've liked.

featured_projects.title: Personal Portfolio
featured_projects.description: A modern, dark-themed portfolio with 3D WebGL scene, glassmorphism effects, particle animations, and a data-driven architecture. Built with React 19, Vite 7, and Tailwind CSS v4.

featured_projects.title: SelfHub
featured_projects.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI assistants access to personal context - journal entries, goals, preferences, and notes - stored in MongoDB for richer, personalized conversations.
features: 9 tools for journals, goals, preferences, notes

collaborative_projects.title: Placemento
collaborative_projects.description: A full-stack placement management portal for MCA NITW with OTP authentication, AG Grid data tables, and a monorepo architecture serving 100+ students and 50+ companies.
features: AG Grid for advanced data tables

collaborative_projects.title: Lingua Connect
collaborative_projects.description: An interactive online platform built on the MERN stack, connecting language learners with personalized tutors for tailored online lessons.

collaborative_projects.title: LeetCode Among Us
collaborative_projects.description: A competitive coding platform for MCA NITW students to practice LeetCode problems together and track progress.

collaborative_projects.title: Noobathon
collaborative_projects.description: A team hackathon project built during MCA 1st year at the CSEA Noobathon event, featuring a responsive web page created collaboratively in a team of 3.

collaborative_projects.title: MCA NITW Website
collaborative_projects.description: Official MCA Course Website for NIT Warangal, providing comprehensive information about the MCA program, faculty, and resources.

collaborative_projects.title: Code Arena
collaborative_projects.description: A real-time competitive coding platform where 2-5 friends race to solve LeetCode problems with built-in C++ and Python code execution via sandboxed Piston containers.
features: Real-time multiplayer coding races with 2-5 players
Built-in C++ and Python execution via sandboxed containers
Private rooms with GitHub OAuth authentication
Server-authoritative scoring based on speed and test cases

other_projects.title: Financial Dashboard
other_projects.description: A comprehensive financial dashboard built with React and TypeScript that provides powerful analytics, AI-style insights, and interactive visualizations for personal finance management.

other_projects.title: AWS DevOps Infrastructure
other_projects.description: A full-stack FARM (FastAPI, React, MongoDB) application containerized with Docker and deployed on AWS, with a comprehensive CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions and Terraform.

other_projects.title: AI Code Translator
other_projects.description: An AI-powered code translation tool that converts code between programming languages using large language models, with a CodeMirror editor and Tokyo Night theme.
features: CodeMirror editor with Tokyo Night theme

other_projects.title: Stock Market Prediction
other_projects.description: An LSTM neural network that predicts stock prices for major tech companies (AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, TSLA) using historical market data from Yahoo Finance with comprehensive visualizations.
features: LSTM neural network for time series forecasting

other_projects.title: GroundZeroNN
other_projects.description: A from-scratch neural network library built with only NumPy - no frameworks. Implements forward/backward propagation, optimizers, and activations achieving 79.8% MNIST accuracy.
features: Neural network built from scratch with NumPy

other_projects.title: Brainstorm Verse
other_projects.description: A modern idea-sharing platform where users can share thoughts, discover innovative ideas, and connect with like-minded creators through threaded discussions and community engagement.

other_projects.title: Authentication System
other_projects.description: A full-stack authentication system with JWT tokens, bcrypt password hashing, and Joi validation, with a React frontend and Express backend.

other_projects.title: Contact Manager
other_projects.description: A full-stack MERN contact management application with MongoDB persistence, full CRUD operations, dark/light mode, and zero-refresh navigation using React Router.

other_projects.title: Tour Vibes
other_projects.description: A full-stack MERN travel journal where users share travel experiences with JWT authentication, image uploads, personal and community feeds, and paginated browsing.

other_projects.title: PacMan Game Unity
other_projects.description: A classic Pac-Man game recreated using Unity Engine with C# scripting for an authentic gaming experience.

other_projects.title: Minesweeper Game Unity
other_projects.description: A classic Minesweeper game recreated using Unity Engine with C# scripting, featuring grid-based gameplay and mine detection mechanics.

other_projects.title: Snake Game Unity
other_projects.description: A classic Snake game built using Unity Engine with C# scripting, featuring smooth movement mechanics and score tracking.

other_projects.title: Flappy Bird Game Unity
other_projects.description: A Flappy Bird clone built using Unity Engine with C# scripting, featuring physics-based gameplay and obstacle generation.

other_projects.title: Music Web Player
other_projects.description: A modern music player with glassmorphism UI, built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features shuffle/repeat modes, rotating album art, and a seekable progress bar.

other_projects.title: Instagram Autopilot
other_projects.description: Fully automated Instagram and X/Twitter content creation and posting using AWS Bedrock AI for content generation, Pillow for branded template images, and Composio SDK for social media integration.
features: AI-powered content generation via AWS Bedrock Claude
Automated daily Instagram and X/Twitter posting
Branded template image generation with Pillow
Configurable content strategy per day of week

community_projects.title: MCP Toolkit
community_projects.description: Production-ready middleware for MCP servers with authentication, caching, rate limiting, CORS, and structured logging. Accepts community contributions.
features: API key, OAuth, and JWT authentication
Response caching with TTL, LRU, and Redis
Token bucket and sliding window rate limiting

community_projects.title: Claude Skills
community_projects.description: Custom Claude Code plugin marketplace with 17 reusable plugins, 20 autonomous agents, and 8 safety hooks covering full-stack development, testing, API design, databases, CI/CD, Docker, security, performance, and more.
features: 17 plugins with 20 agents, 8 hooks, and 24 slash commands
Auto-activating skills and safety hooks for git, security, and PR workflows
Stack-specific plugins for FARM, testing, API design, and databases
CI validation pipeline and tiered installation guide

community_projects.title: Claude Cost Optimizer
community_projects.description: Installable Claude Code plugin with cost-mode skill that saves 30-60% on costs through concise responses, model routing, budget hooks, and efficient workflow patterns.
features: Installable cost-mode skill with 3 intensity levels (lite/standard/strict)
Web-based cost calculator, badge checker, and repo analyzer
7 CLI tools including token estimator and budget hooks
11 deep-dive guides and stack-specific CLAUDE.md templates

community_projects.title: Claude Code Recipes
community_projects.description: 50+ copy-paste recipes for Claude Code covering commands, subagents, hooks, skills, and MCP server configurations.

community_projects.title: Awesome MCP Servers
community_projects.description: A curated list of MCP servers, tools, frameworks, and resources for the Model Context Protocol ecosystem.

community_projects.title: Deploy Guide
community_projects.description: Step-by-step deployment guides for every platform - 25+ guides covering GitHub Pages, Vercel, Render, Railway, AWS, and more.

community_projects.title: Agent Recipes
community_projects.description: Copy-paste AI agent workflows for real-world developer tasks including code review, testing, security scanning, and deployment automation.

community_projects.title: AI Git Hooks
community_projects.description: AI-powered git hooks that auto-review diffs, generate commit messages, run security scans, and enforce code quality on every commit.

community_projects.title: Credly Badge README Action
community_projects.description: A GitHub Action that automatically fetches Credly certifications and badges and syncs them to your GitHub profile README with categorized sections and dark/light theme support.
features: Auto-sync Credly badges to GitHub README weekly
Categorized sections for certifications, partner, and learning badges
Non-destructive updates using HTML comment markers
Dark/light theme support via Credly CDN
